product_summary: A question-routing organization layer: a person asks in plain language, the system finds the accountable human owner, that owner answers from their own knowledge, and every answer carries its owner, trust state, and sources — with internal routing hidden from the asker.
audiences: knowledge owner accountable for a domain
anti_keywords: exposed routing internals to end users
knowledge bodies leaving the owner environment
visual_keywords: trustworthy answer chat with owner and source chips
staged concept review cards with approve edit reject
interaction_keywords: ask and receive an accountable answer
watch a staged routing trace resolve
approve edit or reject a staged concept draft
trace one question from arrival to answer

seeds.title: Primer
seeds.notes: Practical component contracts and dense developer-tool surfaces

seeds.title: Carbon
seeds.notes: Enterprise data UI, status patterns, and accessibility guidance

seeds.title: Atlassian Design System
seeds.notes: Workspace navigation, permissions, and operational SaaS patterns

notes: Base surfaces should stay neutral and readable under dense operational data.
Use blue for primary focus and selection, green for healthy automation, red for risk and blocked handoffs.
Avoid a single purple or blue gradient identity; the product needs role, risk, and ownership distinction.

query: trustworthy answer chat with owner attribution and source citations
human approval inbox and review queue with status tags
operations event feed dashboard with audit log table dark theme
must_include: answer attribution: owner, trust state, and source visible near the answer
review queue or inbox with clear per-item disposition controls
live event feed or audit table with legible status tags
avoid_patterns: internal routing scores exposed to the end user
notes: References guide density, workspace layout, feed and table pairing, and operational affordances only.
Do not copy reference colors or generated copy. Final IA must keep answer attribution, trust state, sources, and audit visible, and must hide routing internals from the question-asker.
Pinterest is optional. This project defaults to local Omnigen UI references.
Only selected local files should be connected to visual_reference.sources.
